name: deployment-engineer
description: Expert deployment engineer specializing in modern CI/CD pipelines,
capabilities: Design deployment strategies including blue-green, canary, and rolling deployments
Create and optimize CI/CD pipelines for various platforms and languages
Provide guidance on container orchestration with Kubernetes and Docker
Troubleshoot deployment failures and suggest remediation steps
Recommend infrastructure as code tools and practices
Assist with cloud platform deployment configurations
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This is a prompt-only skill with no executable code. The static analyzer scanned 0 files (0 lines) and detected 0 potential security issues. The skill consists entirely of instructional prompts for an AI assistant, with no scripts, network calls, or file system access. Risk score: 0/100.
valueStatement: Application deployment is complex and error-prone. The Deployment Engineer skill provides expert guidance for designing deployment strategies, creating CI/CD pipelines, and troubleshooting issues across cloud platforms.
limitations: Cannot execute deployment commands or modify infrastructure directly
Cannot access your specific CI/CD system without configuration details
Recommendations are generic and may require customization for your environment
Cannot debug runtime issues that occur after deployment completes

useCases.targetUser: DevOps engineers building or improving their deployment pipelines
useCases.title: CI/CD Pipeline Design
useCases.description: Get expert guidance on building a robust CI/CD pipeline for your application stack

useCases.title: Deployment Strategy Selection
useCases.description: Choose the right deployment strategy based on your risk tolerance and infrastructure

useCases.targetUser: Developers and ops teams dealing with deployment issues
useCases.title: Troubleshooting Failed Deployments
useCases.description: Diagnose why your deployment failed and get step-by-step remediation advice

promptTemplates.title: Basic Deployment Question
promptTemplates.prompt: I need to deploy my [programming language] application to [cloud platform]. What is the recommended approach for setting up a basic CI/CD pipeline?

promptTemplates.title: Advanced Pipeline Optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: Our current deployment process takes 30 minutes. Analyze this pipeline configuration and suggest optimizations to reduce deployment time while maintaining reliability.

promptTemplates.title: Kubernetes Deployment
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me design a Kubernetes deployment strategy for a microservices application. Include recommendations for rolling updates, health checks, and rollback procedures.

promptTemplates.title: Deployment Troubleshooting
promptTemplates.prompt: Our deployment to [environment] failed with the error: [error message]. Walk me through the debugging process and suggest specific remediation steps.

bestPractices: Always implement automated rollback mechanisms in your deployment pipeline
Use infrastructure as code to maintain reproducible environments
Run smoke tests in staging before any production deployment
antiPatterns: Deploying directly to production without testing in a staging environment
Ignoring deployment logs and not setting up alerting for failures
Making manual changes to production instead of codifying them

faq.question: Can this skill execute deployments for me?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides expert guidance and recommendations. You must execute deployments using your own CI/CD tools and infrastructure.

faq.question: Which cloud platforms does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill provides general guidance applicable to AWS, GCP, Azure, and other cloud platforms. Specific configurations may vary.

faq.question: Does this skill work with Kubernetes?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill includes guidance on Kubernetes deployment strategies, YAML configurations, and orchestration best practices.

faq.question: Can this skill help with Terraform or Ansible?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill provides recommendations for infrastructure as code tools including Terraform, Ansible, and CloudFormation.

faq.question: How do I get started with my first deployment?
faq.answer: Start by identifying your deployment target and build pipeline. Then use the skill to get specific recommendations for your technology stack.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for beginners?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill includes basic prompts for newcomers and advanced scenarios for experienced DevOps engineers.
